## CommandDescriptor.cliName property

Optional CLI display name (kebab-case). Defaults to `toKebabCase(name)`<!-- -->. Set this when a command needs a CLI-specific alias that does not match the derivation rule.

**Signature:**

```typescript
cliName?: string;
```
